productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Classic Tan Sandals
description: A perfect casual footwear for the man of style, this pair of sandals from lee cooper is crafted from a combination of leathers to offer exemplary comfort.UpperWide midfoot leather straps with a padded fabric inner lining for sweat-free and abrasion-free comfortPadded leather footbed ergonomically raised to offer a massage feelOutsoleTPR outsole with strategically placed hollow geometrical pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortSandal careWipe away dust with a clean and dry clothDo not store in direct sunlight
